title: Quieter Pets
description: A simple resource pack to make cats and dogs meow and bark 80% less often.
body:
# Quieter pets!

This is a ressource pack that makes tamed cats and all wolves quieter by adding blank sounds so that 80% of the time, their idle sounds are silent.

## Features

- Volume is preserved, the pets just don't yap as often.
- Stray cats will still meow as usual, only tamed cats are affected and wolves are affected.
- 20 kilobytes. I'm pretty proud of that.
- All cat and dog sound variants are supported.
- Supports the new 26.1 baby mob sounds as well.

## Limitations

Because of the limitations of the technique used to shut the yapping, it is not possible to target only tamed wolves.

Still because of the technique used here, closed captions for meowing and barking will still display when the pets are playing their blank sound, which may be surprising or distracting.

If you use another ressource pack that replaces or adds pet noises, this pack may well break.

---

⚠️ Oh and by the way, not to be a downer but I don't support the purchase of any Microsoft product or service because among other things they are enabling the genocide of the people of Palestine via their collaboration with the IDF. I'd like to take this tiny place on the Internet to ask you to support a Palestinian humanitarian or militant organisation as well as individual Palestinians online if you are able. 🇵🇸
